description.value: Cost: 1 Requirements: Ability to weave, sufficient Energy Range: Touch to 5 feet maximum (no supporting energy for range) Effect: Cast a single-energy weave (Primary Energy only, no Supporting Energy). See (Magic System) for full weaving rules and Simple Weave limitations Weaving Roll: Primary Energy Potential + Primary Energy Mastery
